Bash(python3 -c "
import psycopg2, os

# Read DATABASE_URL from .env
with open\('backend/.env'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith\('DATABASE_URL='\):
            db_url = line.strip\(\).split\('=', 1\)[1]

print\('Connecting to:', db_url.split\('@'\)[1].split\('/'\)[0]\)

try:
    conn = psycopg2.connect\(db_url, connect_timeout=10\)
    conn.autocommit = True
    cur = conn.cursor\(\)
    
    sql = open\('supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql'\).read\(\)
    cur.execute\(sql\)
    
    # Verify tables were created
    cur.execute\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT table_name 
        FROM information_schema.tables 
        WHERE table_schema = 'public' 
        AND table_name IN \('tenants','users','stores','shelf_uploads','analyses','detected_products'\)
        ORDER BY table_name;
    \\"\\"\\"\)
    tables = [row[0] for row in cur.fetchall\(\)]
    print\('Tables created:', tables\)
    
    # Verify indexes
    cur.execute\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes 
        WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND indexname LIKE 'idx_%'
        ORDER BY indexname;
    \\"\\"\\"\)
    indexes = [row[0] for row in cur.fetchall\(\)]
    print\('Indexes created:', indexes\)
    
    # Verify RLS enabled
    cur.execute\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT tablename, rowsecurity 
        FROM pg_tables 
        WHERE schemaname = 'public' 
        AND tablename IN \('tenants','users','stores','shelf_uploads','analyses','detected_products'\)
        ORDER BY tablename;
    \\"\\"\\"\)
    rls = [\(row[0], row[1]\) for row in cur.fetchall\(\)]
    print\('RLS status:', rls\)
    
    cur.close\(\)
    conn.close\(\)
    print\('Migration completed successfully!'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

import httpx

    'https://images.pexels.com/photos/264636/pexels-photo-264636.jpeg?w=800',
    'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1604719312566-8912e9227c6a?w=800',

]
for u in urls:
    try:
        r = httpx.get\(u, follow_redirects=True, timeout=10, headers={'User-Agent': '1000er.ai/0.1'}\)
        ct = r.headers.get\('content-type',''\)
        print\(f'{r.status_code} {ct[:30]} {u[:60]}'\)

        print\(f'FAIL {e} {u[:60]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/macbook/Desktop/1000er.ai && python3 -c "
from supabase import create_client
import os

# Read .env
env = {}
for line in open\('backend/.env'\):
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k, v = line.strip\(\).split\('=', 1\)
        env[k] = v

sb = create_client\(env['SUPABASE_URL'], env['SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY']\)

# Create tenant
t = sb.table\('tenants'\).insert\({'name': 'MVP Tenant', 'plan': 'free'}\).execute\(\)
tenant = t.data[0]
print\(f'Tenant: {tenant[\\"id\\"]}'\)

# Create user
u = sb.table\('users'\).insert\({
    'tenant_id': tenant['id'],
    'email': 'admin@1000er.ai',
    'role': 'admin'
}\).execute\(\)
user = u.data[0]
print\(f'User:   {user[\\"id\\"]}'\)

# Create store
s = sb.table\('stores'\).insert\({
    'tenant_id': tenant['id'],
    'name': 'MVP Store',
    'address': 'Test Address',
    'chain': 'Test Chain'
}\).execute\(\)
store = s.data[0]
print\(f'Store:  {store[\\"id\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import httpx, json

# Download a test shelf image first
img = httpx.get\('https://images.pexels.com/photos/264636/pexels-photo-264636.jpeg?w=800', headers={'User-Agent': '1000er.ai/0.1'}\)
print\(f'Image downloaded: {len\(img.content\)} bytes'\)

from app.main import app
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
client = TestClient\(app\)

# POST upload
r = client.post\(
    '/api/v1/analyses/upload',
    files={'file': \('shelf.jpg', img.content, 'image/jpeg'\)}
\)
print\(f'Upload status: {r.status_code}'\)
data = r.json\(\)

if r.status_code == 200:
    analysis = data['analysis']
    print\(f'Analysis ID:     {analysis[\\"id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Status:          {analysis[\\"status\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Products found:  {len\(analysis[\\"products\\"]\)}'\)
    if analysis.get\('summary'\):
        s = analysis['summary']
        print\(f'Total facings:   {s[\\"total_facings\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'OOS count:       {s[\\"oos_count\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'Avg confidence:  {s[\\"avg_confidence\\"]:.2f}'\)
    
    # GET by ID
    r2 = client.get\(f'/api/v1/analyses/{analysis[\\"id\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'\\\\nGET by ID: {r2.status_code}'\)
    d2 = r2.json\(\)
    print\(f'Products:  {len\(d2[\\"products\\"]\)}'\)
    
    # GET list
    r3 = client.get\('/api/v1/analyses/?limit=10&offset=0'\)
    print\(f'\\\\nGET list:  {r3.status_code}'\)
    d3 = r3.json\(\)
    print\(f'Total:     {d3[\\"total\\"]}'\)
else:
    print\('Error:', json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: MVP completo — shelf intelligence con Gemini 2.5 Flash

Backend \(FastAPI\):
- Servicio de vision con Gemini 2.5 Flash para análisis de lineales
- Prompt optimizado: sin duplicados, facings totales, productos parciales, detección de moneda
- Endpoints: POST /upload \(imagen→análisis\), GET /{id}, GET / \(paginado\)
- Supabase Storage para imágenes, PostgreSQL para datos
- Multi-tenant con tenant_id fijo para MVP

Frontend \(Next.js\):
- /uploads: drag & drop + cámara móvil + preview + spinner
- /analysis/[id]: KPIs + tabla de productos detectados
- /dashboard: historial de análisis con paginación

Infraestructura:
- Migraciones SQL para 6 tablas con FK, índices y RLS
- Alembic configurado para futuras migraciones
- Docker ready \(backend/Dockerfile\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import httpx

urls = [
    'https://images.pexels.com/photos/3962285/pexels-photo-3962285.jpeg?w=1280',
    'https://images.pexels.com/photos/2733918/pexels-photo-2733918.jpeg?w=1280',
    'https://images.pexels.com/photos/3985062/pexels-photo-3985062.jpeg?w=1280',
    'https://images.pexels.com/photos/1005638/pexels-photo-1005638.jpeg?w=1280',
]
for u in urls:
    try:
        r = httpx.head\(u, follow_redirects=True, timeout=10, headers={'User-Agent': '1000er.ai/0.1'}\)
        ct = r.headers.get\('content-type',''\)[:20]
        print\(f'{r.status_code} {ct} {u.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1][:30]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'FAIL {u.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1][:30]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
from app.deps import get_supabase_client
sb = get_supabase_client\(\)

# Read the migration SQL
with open\('../supabase/migrations/002_gpv_core.sql', 'r'\) as f:
    sql = f.read\(\)

# Execute via rpc if available, otherwise try direct
result = sb.rpc\('exec_sql', {'query': sql}\).execute\(\)
print\('Result:', result\)
" 2>&1)
